content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.5-xhigh

## Summary

No correctness, safety, or robustness issues found in the reviewed branch. Verified the changed tests and gates with `cargo test --features test-stub --test unit`, `cargo clippy -- -D warnings`, `cargo clippy --features test-stub -- -D warnings`, `cargo fmt --check`, and `nix build`.

## Amendments

None.
